nasb.text: Beloved, you are acting faithfully in whatever you accomplish for the brethren, and especially when they are strangers;

esv.text: Beloved, it is a faithful thing you do in all your efforts for these brothers, strangers as they are,

cnv.text: 親愛的，你向弟兄所行的，特別是向外地來的弟兄所行的，都是出於忠心。

ccb.text: 亲爱的弟兄，你常常忠心地照顾素不相识的弟兄，

csbs.text: 蒙爱的人哪，你为弟兄们，尤其是为异乡的弟兄们所做的，都是忠心的。
